Everything looks perfect. Here's a complete summary of all changes made:

---

## Changes Made

### 5 Files Modified

**`template/addons/next-auth/api-handler.ts`**
- `DiscordProvider` → `GitHubProvider` (import + provider config)
- `env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID/SECRET` → `env.GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET`

**`template/addons/next-auth/api-handler-prisma.ts`**
- Same provider swap (this is the Prisma-adapter variant used when Prisma is selected)

**`template/addons/env/auth-schema.mjs`**
- Zod schema: `DISCORD_CLIENT_ID/SECRET` → `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET`

**`template/addons/env/auth-prisma-schema.mjs`**
- Same schema swap (the auth+Prisma combo variant)

**`template/base/.env-example`**
- Comment and placeholder vars updated: `# Next Auth GitHub Provider` with `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=` / `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=`

**`template/page-studs/index/with-auth-trpc-tw.tsx`**
- Removed `signIn` from next-auth import (no longer needed generically)
- Added `import { GitHubSignInButton } from "../components/GitHubSignInButton"`
- Replaced the generic sign-in/sign-out button with a conditional: `<GitHubSignInButton />` when unauthenticated, "Sign out" button when authenticated

### 2 Files Created

**`template/addons/next-auth/github-sign-in-button.tsx`**
- Reusable `GitHubSignInButton` component with inline GitHub SVG mark, Tailwind-styled, calls `signIn("github")` on click — no external icon library dependency

**`template/page-studs/profile.tsx`**
- Full profile page (`/profile` route) showing:
  - GitHub avatar via `next/image` (`session.user.image`)
  - Display name (`session.user.name`)
  - Email if present (`session.user.email`)
  - Database user ID fetched via **tRPC** `trpc.useQuery(["auth.getSession"])` — explicitly demonstrating the GitHub session flows through the tRPC context
  - `useEffect` redirect to `/` for unauthenticated users; loading state handled gracefully

### Nothing changed (already correct)
- **`prisma/auth-schema.prisma`** — Account model's `provider`/`providerAccountId` + `@@unique` constraint is already provider-agnostic ✅
- **`trpc/auth-prisma-context.ts`** — `getServerSession` passes whichever session NextAuth creates, provider-agnostic ✅
- **`next-auth.d.ts`** — `DefaultSession["user"]` already includes `name`, `email`, `image` ✅
